title: Amtech C0400 Box Immersion Heater Spanner
features: VERSATILE: This box immersion heater spanner is used for installing and removing the electric immersion heaters fitted on domestic hot water cylinders
EXTRA LEVERAGE: It is provided with a removable 25mm Tommy bar for extra leverage
CORROSION RESISTANT: It is made from drop forged, zinc plated carbon steel for added corrosion resistance
PRECISION CUTTING: Provides smooth and accurate results
GENERAL DIY TASKS: Versatile addition to any home or professional toolkit
description: Product Description Amtech have a fantastic range of essential tools for all your DIY requirements. Great value prices are coupled with a very compelling 3 year product guarantee. So keep your home, garage and garden looking great and well maintained for less! Don’t forget to also take advantage of Amtech’s free product advice service – see pack for more details. Please note that Amtech warranty and service terms are only applicable to genuine Amtech products. Safety Warning No Box Contains 1x Spanner See more
